value_chain_position: Financial management platform layer — operates the dominant SMB accounting/payroll OS (QuickBooks), consumer tax filing (TurboTax), and Credit Karma financial data network, collectively the operating layer for small business finance and consumer financial decisions.
relative_comps: Intuit is the clearest toll-taker in small-business financial software: QuickBooks commands 85%+ market share in US SMB accounting and TurboTax dominates assisted tax. The 15% YoY growth reflects Credit Karma monetization and QuickBooks Online international expansion; FCF margin of 37% is best-in-class. At $80B it trades at a significant premium to Xero and Bill.com on EV/FCF but the moat durability and platform ecosystem lock-in justify the posture.
